description: Stylish and comfortable, this analogue wrist watch from fastrack is designed for those who love their everyday accessories. Hit the road in style with this designer dial and don that rock star look.Case diameter:  38 mmCase thickness: 6 mmDial shape: RoundMetallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSub dials showing date and secondsLeather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with Arabic numbering of 6 to 8 o& rsquo clock and 10 to 12 o& rsquo clock, with brand name marking at 9 o& rsquo clock, and brand logo below the 12 o& rsquo clock markingQuartz movement of time display with carved out handsScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters, which helps you wear it when washing the car
